videoSnippet.title: Luc Winants takes on Kamsky, Karpov and Carlsen
videoSnippet.description:

Luc Winants vs Gata Kamsky
Tilburg Interpolis (1992), Tilburg NED, rd 3, Oct-14
Caro-Kann Defense: Accelerated Panov Attack. Modern Variation (B10)

1. e4 c6 2. c4 d5 3. cd5 cd5 4. ed5 Nf6 5. Nc3 Nd5 6. Nf3 e6 7. d4 Nc6 8. Bd3 Be7 9. O-O O-O 10. Re1 Nc3 11. bc3 b6 12. Qc2 g6 13. Bh6 Re8 14. h4 Bf8 15. Bg5 Be7 16. Bf4 Bb7 17. h5 Kg7 18. Qd2 Qd5 19. Be4 Qh5 20. Ne5 Rac8 21. Re3 f6 22. Rh3 Qh3 23. gh3 fe5 24. de5 Rc7 25. Kh1 Na5 26. Bb7 Nb7 27. Bh6 Kg8 28. Rd1 Rec8 29. Qe2 Rc3 30. Qg4 Kf7 31. Rd4 R3c6 32. Bg5 Bg5 33. Qg5 Nc5 34. h4 Re8 35. h5 Rc7 36. Qf6 Kg8 37. Rd8 Rc8 38. h6

0:01 Hello Everyone!
00:15 Luc Winants Memorial Tournament
02:00 Luc vs Gata Kamsky
10:00 Luc vs Anatoly Karpov
20:20 Luc vs Magnus Carlsen
